---
title: "Live Display"
format: html

---

## 

##  Live Question & Answer

---

```yaml


##  Audience Screen

```{r}
#| context: server
#| echo: false

library(shiny)

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Live Session - Current Question"),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      wellPanel(
        h2("📋 Current Question", align = "center"),
        h3(textOutput("current_question"), align = "center", 
           style = "color: #2c3e50; font-weight: bold;"),
        hr(),
        h2("⌨️ Live Answer", align = "center"),
        h3(textOutput("live_answer"), align = "center", 
           style = "color: #27ae60;")
      )
    )
  ),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(4,
      actionButton("demo_q1", "Demo: AI Question", 
                   width = "100%", class = "btn-primary")
    ),
    column(4,
      actionButton("demo_q2", "Demo: Policy Question", 
                   width = "100%", class = "btn-info")
    ),
    column(4,
      actionButton("demo_q3", "Demo: Economy Question", 
                   width = "100%", class = "btn-success")
    )
  ),
  
  br(),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(12,
      wellPanel(
        h4("Session Info", align = "center"),
        textOutput("session_info", inline = TRUE)
      )
    )
  )
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  current_question <- reactiveVal("Waiting for speaker to select a question...")
  current_answer <- reactiveVal("")
  is_typing <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  
  output$current_question <- renderText({
    current_question()
  })
  
  output$live_answer <- renderText({
    if(current_answer() == "") {
      "Speaker will start typing here..."
    } else {
      current_answer()
    }
  })
  
  output$session_info <- renderText({
    paste("Last updated:", Sys.time())
  })
  
  # Simulate live typing
  type_text <- function(full_text, delay = 0.03) {
    if(is_typing()) return()
    is_typing(TRUE)
    
    for(i in 1:nchar(full_text)) {
      current_answer(substr(full_text, 1, i))
      Sys.sleep(delay)
    }
    is_typing(FALSE)
  }
  
  # Demo 1: AI Question
  observeEvent(input$demo_q1, {
    current_question("How does AI embedding detect similar questions?")
    
    answer <- "The system converts text to vector representations using sentence transformers (384-dimensions). Then it calculates cosine similarity between vectors. When similarity exceeds 0.85, the system flags it as a potential duplicate."
    
    type_text(answer)
  })
  
  # Demo 2: Policy Question
  observeEvent(input$demo_q2, {
    current_question("What are the implications of recent AI regulations?")
    
    answer <- "Recent AI regulations focus on transparency, accountability, and safety. Key implications include: mandatory disclosure of AI-generated content, risk assessment requirements, and compliance frameworks for high-risk applications."
    
    type_text(answer)
  })
  
  # Demo 3: Economy Question
  observeEvent(input$demo_q3, {
    current_question("How will AI affect global trade patterns?")
    
    answer <- "AI is expected to reshape global trade through: 1) Automated logistics optimization, 2) Predictive demand forecasting, 3) Personalized trade agreements, and 4) Reduced language barriers. This could increase trade efficiency by 15-20% by 2030."
    
    type_text(answer)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
